title: Benchmark run record
description: One record per benchmark run in the ctx longitudinal study. A run is a single agent attempt at a task under one experiment arm; records are appended as JSON Lines and joined against ctx gate logs for analysis.

schema_version.description: Version of this record schema. Always 1 for records validated by this schema; a breaking change bumps the version and the schema $id.

run_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this run (UUID).

task_id.description: Identifier of the benchmark task this run attempted.

arm.description: Experiment arm the run belongs to. Conventional values are "control" (no gates), "gates" (advisory gates), and "gates_blocking" (blocking gates); the field is deliberately not enum-restricted so new arms can be added without a schema change.

run_index.description: Zero-based index of this run among the repeated runs of (task_id, arm).

started_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which the run started.

finished_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which the run finished.

model_version.description: Exact model identifier used by the agent for this run.

ctx_version.description: Version of ctx installed during the run.

harness_mode.description: How the ctx harness was wired into the agent: "local" (hooks generated into the repo) or "plugin" (marketplace plugin).

gate_config.description: Effective gate configuration for the run.

fail_on.description: Gate failure condition (e.g. a ctx check/score threshold expression), or null when no failure condition is configured.

blocking.description: Whether gate failures block the agent (true) or are advisory only (false).

gate_log_enabled.description: Whether gate evaluations were appended to .ctx/gate-log.jsonl during the run.

transcript_path.description: Path (relative to the study data root) of the full agent transcript for this run.

exit_status.description: How the run ended: "success" (task completed and accepted), "failure" (completed but not accepted), "timeout" (hit the wall-clock limit), "error" (harness or infrastructure error).

score.description: Final `ctx score --against <base>` metrics for the run's diff. Exactly the seven ctx score metric keys, all numeric.

gate_evaluations.description: Number of gate evaluations performed during the run.

gate_blocks.description: Optional: number of gate evaluations that blocked the agent during the run.

gate_block_recovered.description: Optional: whether the agent recovered (eventually passed the gate) after at least one gate block.

wall_clock_seconds.description: Total wall-clock duration of the run in seconds.

agent.description: Optional agent-side accounting reported by the agent harness (e.g. `claude -p` result payload).

session_id.description: Agent session identifier, used for exact joins against gate logs and transcripts.

total_cost_usd.description: Total model cost of the run in USD.

total_tokens.description: Total tokens (input + output) consumed by the run.

num_turns.description: Number of agent turns. Optional within `agent`: not guaranteed to be reported by `claude -p`.

acceptance.description: Optional result of the task's acceptance command -- the ctx-independent functional endpoint of the run (did the change actually work).

command.description: Acceptance command that was executed (e.g. the task's test command).

exit_code.description: Exit code of the acceptance command.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock duration of the acceptance command in seconds.

normalization.description: Optional diff-size normalization data: the denominator for per-line deltas when comparing runs of different sizes.

lines_added.description: Lines added by the run's final diff.

lines_removed.description: Lines removed by the run's final diff.

lines_changed.description: Total lines changed (added + removed) by the run's final diff.

study_id.description: Optional identifier of the study this run belongs to, so multiple studies can share one record store.

task_seed.description: Optional seed used by the task generator to produce this run's task instance.

generator_version.description: Optional version of the task generator that produced the task instance.

scorer_ctx_version.description: Optional version of the ctx build used by the offline scorer. The existing `ctx_version` remains the harness build installed during the run.

retry_attempt.description: Optional zero-based retry attempt number when a run was retried after an infrastructure error.

notes.description: Optional free-form operator notes about the run.
